mapper.select: SELECT a.attendance_id, a.emp_id, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.attendance_status, e.emp_name, d.dep_name FROM attendance a JOIN employees e ON a.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN department d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id WHERE a.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.attendance_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT SUM(leave_days) AS remaining_leave_days FROM leave_history lv WHERE lv.emp_id = #{empId} AND lv.leave_status = '승인'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (attendance_id, employee_id, attendance_date, status, clock_in, created_time) VALUES (#{attendanceId}, #{employeeId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{status}, #{clockIn}, #{createdTime});
